titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 179: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 179. (A.R. No. 240 of 1902.) KĪḺŪR, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Vīraṭṭānēśvara temple.

Records that Gaṇavadi Mayilāḍi, a servant (peṇḍāṭṭi) of Uttamachōḷa-Milāḍu uḍaiyār made a gift of a quarter chey of land, after purchase by remitting both the price-money and tax-money to the sabhaiyār of Tirukkōvalūr, for burning a perpetual lamp with an uḻakku of ghee daily to the god Tiruvīraṭṭanatt-āḻvār of Tirukkōvalūr in Kuṟukkai-kūṟṟam in Milāḍu. She also gifted one Īḻa- lamp for burning the lamp.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. VII No. 868.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmakku yāṇṭu patiṉañcāvatu milāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikūṟṟattu tiru
kovalurRead tirukkovalūrtiruvirāṭṭānattāḻvārkku Uttamacoḻa milāṭuṭaiyār peṉṭāṭṭiRead peṇṭāṭṭikaṇavati mayilāṭi candrādittaval
nondāviḷakku Onṟinukku ṉicatam Uḻakku ney koṇṭu Erikka Īḻa viḷakku Onṟu tirukkovalūr sabhaiyāriṭai kaḷiyakkaḻanik
kāṇik kollappāṭṭil kiḻakkaṭaiya kālceyyum vilaidravyamum Iṟaidravyamum kuṭuttuk koṇṭu kuṭutteṉ kaṇavati ma
yilāṭiyen Itu paṉmāheśvara(ra) rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 179 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
